name: data_transform
description: Filter, group-by/aggregate, pivot, and sort a CSV or Parquet file using declarative parameters. No Python code required. Result is a list of row dicts ready for generate_chart, fill_template, or data_export. Mutually exclusive: group_by vs pivot. Only works on CSV/TSV/Parquet files — not JSON.

file_path.description: Absolute path to a .csv, .tsv, .parquet, or .pq file. Obtain from list_data_files or use a known path.

filters.description: List of filter conditions ANDed together. Each item: {"column": "col", "operator": "==", "value": "val"}. Operators: ==, !=, >, >=, <, <=, in, not_in, contains, not_null, is_null.

value.description: Scalar or array depending on operator. Omit for not_null/is_null.

group_by.description: Columns to group by. Requires aggregations. Mutually exclusive with pivot.

aggregations.description: Aggregations to compute when using group_by. Each item: {"column": "col", "function": "sum", "alias": "total_col"}. Functions: sum, mean, median, min, max, count, count_distinct, std, first, last.

alias.description: Output column name. Defaults to function_column.

pivot.description: Pivot spec. Mutually exclusive with group_by. Output columns named {values}_{column_value}.

columns.description: Column whose unique values become new column headers.

values.description: Column to aggregate into cell values.

fill_value.description: Value for missing cells. Default: null.

limit.description: Maximum rows to return. Default: no limit.

data.description: List of result row dicts. Pass directly to generate_chart or fill_template.

operation.description: Operation performed: filter_only, group_by, pivot, or none.
